title: physostemon humilis
intro: Physostemon humilis, also known as the Cape Mahogany or Brachystegia, is a flowering plant native to southern Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Physostemon humilis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and sometimes used in combination with other medicinal plants, highlighting its versatile application in folk medicine.
